summary: Iteration 278: Global Country Selector + Phone Rollout - All features verified working. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified on desktop and mobile.
critical_code_review_comments: Console warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in AffiliatesPage - minor React warning, not blocking
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data, TEST_ prefixed entries created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 278 verified: 1) CountryAwarePhoneField upgraded from 10 East African countries to 58+ countries (61 in dropdown including duplicates like US/Canada with +1). 2) Searchable dropdown on desktop with keyboard navigation (ArrowUp, ArrowDown, Enter, Escape). 3) Searchable bottom sheet on mobile with sticky search. 4) Flag + country name + dial code display in dropdown. 5) Tanzania (+255) is default. 6) PhoneNumberField applied on AffiliateApplyPage (/partners/apply) and AffiliatesPage admin create drawer. 7) Phone number strips leading zero on input (0712 becomes 712). 8) Phone normalized on submit (e.g., +255712345678). 9) Search works by country name (Kenya) and dial code (+44). 10) Country selection updates prefix and closes dropdown.
